_instructions.usage: Fill in every field below with real project data, then seed it with: npx tsx scripts/seed-from-json.ts path/to/this-file.json
rules: Do NOT remove any key — if unknown, leave as null or empty string.
Leave image/document storage_url and url as empty string '' — add via admin Media panel

project.name: Mahagun Manorialle
project.address: Pocket B-9B, Jaypee Wish Town, Sector 128, Noida Expressway, Uttar Pradesh 201304
project.description: Ultra-luxury ready-to-move signature G+40 skyscraper offering breathtaking 180-degree views over the Jaypee Wishtown Golf Course.
project.long_description: Mahagun Manorialle is an architectural masterpiece located in the highly exclusive residential corridor of Sector 128, Noida Expressway. Spread across 3.86 acres of land, this super-premium, ready-to-move gated community consists of 6 iconic high-rise towers rising to a majestic G+40 floors, housing just 386 palatial residences. Designed by the legendary architect Hafeez Contractor, the project is structured with premium eco-friendly concepts conforming to the IGBC Gold rating. Each condominium occupies a high spatial volume with 11-foot ceilings, imported Italian marble flooring, and ducted VRF climate control. The flagship luxury amenities include a spectacular rooftop clubhouse with an infinity pool hanging over the green golf course, a professional-grade spa, sundecks, and a 24-hour dedicated concierge service. Strategically positioned just minutes away from the Jaypee Wish Town Golf Course and Eastern Peripheral corridor, it represents the ultimate landmark for luxury end-users in Delhi NCR.
project.design_theme: Modern Classical Art Deco & Golf Views
marketing_claims: 180-Degree Vistas over Jaypee Wishtown Golf Course
Rooftop Clubhouse with Hanging Infinity Pool
Centralized VRF Hot and Cold Air Conditioning

builder.name: Mahagun Group
builder.company_overview: Mahagun Group is a multi-billion dollar conglomerate in India operating across premium residential townships, hospitality, and commercial high-street retail developments since 1995. The group has delivered over 15.76 million sq ft of real estate, encompassing more than 11,500 residential units in Delhi NCR. Known for creating landmark high-rises with outstanding architectural aesthetics, structural certifications, and strict RERA regulatory compliance, the group maintains a highly stable financial pedigree.

unit_types.name: 3 BHK Condominium
unit_types.subtitle: Exclusive golf view 3 BHK suite
unit_types.description: Ultra luxury 3 BHK suite featuring grand double-height private entrance lobby, expansive master bedroom with wooden flooring, customized walk-in closet, pre-ducted VRF air conditioning, and massive wrap balconies offering 180-degree golf course views.
whats_included: Central ducted VRF hot and cold AC
Premium wood flush doors with teak veneer
Kohler and TOTO bathroom fixture setups

unit_types.name: 4 BHK Imperial
unit_types.subtitle: Palatial golf-view estate
unit_types.description: Flagship 4 BHK Imperial layout offering exceptional spatial planning, a master lounge suite with walk-in dress areas, a massive formal living hall, customized modular kitchen, and an attached servant quarter with separate access.

assumptions: GST is 0% for ready-to-move units with Completion Certificates.
Prices correspond to premium golf-view resale trades in Q3 2026.

payment_plan.notes: Full transaction execution and handover must occur within 60 days of registry booking.

decision_profile.decision_thesis: Mahagun Manorialle is the ultimate wealth preservation trophy asset on the Noida Expressway, offering flawless legal titles and unparalleled golf course vistas.
why_buy: Unparalleled 180-degree scenic vistas overlooking the green Jaypee Wish Town golf course.
Signature rooftop club featuring an infinity pool hanging over the skyline.
Timely completed construction with full CC/OC received, 0% GST, and active flat registries.
why_avoid: Extremely high initial entry price position (starts at ₹4.17 Cr) leaves no room for speculative fast-flipping.
High monthly AOA maintenance costs driven by premium centralized ducted VRF and roof deck services.
decision_profile.best_for: Ultra-HNIs, senior corporate leadership, and NRI buyers seeking ready-to-occupy trophy residences on the Expressway.
decision_profile.not_ideal_for: Affordable budget seekers, cash-flow yields-first investors, or short-term speculative buyers.

buyerPersonas.headline: Prestige, Views, and Luxury
reasons: G+40 signature skyscraper featuring Hafeez Contractor aesthetics.

investment_insights.appreciation_desc: Highly secure capital preservation in a mature ultra-elite expressway corridor.
investment_insights.rental_desc: Elite corporate executive rent profiles commanding ₹1.2L to ₹2.5L per month.
investment_insights.market_desc: Extremely high demand with virtually zero ready inventory.
investment_insights.liquidity_desc: Trophy assets command rapid buyer matching in the HNI pool.

persona_profile.risk_appetite: Conservative - demands completed, legally clean trophy assets
persona_profile.family_stage: Established nuclear families or elite corporate couples
persona_profile.work_location: Expressway corporate corridors and central NCR nodes
persona_profile.motivation_note: Driven by address prestige, architectural designer credentials, and exceptional golf-course lifestyle comfort.

recommendation_profile.primary_thesis: The ultimate completed trophy condominium on the Expressway. Boasting Hafeez Contractor architecture and 180-degree golf course views, Mahagun Manorialle is a masterpiece of vertical luxury.
recommendation_profile.end_use_thesis: Outstanding. Italian marble flooring, centralized VRF climate systems, and hanging rooftop pools provide an unparalleled resort lifestyle.
recommendation_profile.investment_thesis: Defensive capital preservation. trophy assets in Sector 128 command premium resale valuations with zero risk of structural delays.
recommendation_profile.family_thesis: Excellent. Fully secured, low-density gated community with immediate proximity to top-tier international schools.
recommendation_profile.investor_thesis: Highly secure wealth container offering consistent 12-15% long-term asset appreciation and stable luxury tenant yields.
recommendation_profile.luxury_thesis: Good quality architecture with grand entrance lobbies and premium modular specifications, representing high-end luxury.
recommendation_profile.risk_thesis: Zero delivery risk. All documentation is legally vetted, with bipartite flat registries fully active.
negotiation_leverage: Highlight high monthly maintenance costs to negotiate price down with motivated resale sellers.
recommendation_profile.timeline_advice: Perfect time to acquire. completed ready-to-move units in Sector 128 are highly limited.

competitors.this_project_advantage: Spectacular G+40 skyscraper height; direct panoramic golf-course views vs standard skyline views.
competitors.competitor_advantage: Slightly closer to Noida central boundaries.
competitors.verdict: Choose Mahagun Manorialle for premium golf course views and skyscraper height; choose Prateek for central access.
competitors.price_delta_note: Mahagun Manorialle is approx ₹2,000/sqft premium to Prateek Edifice.
